# pfsense_system_general (Data Source)

Retrieves the [system general setup](https://docs.netgate.com/pfsense/en/latest/config/general.html) configuration including hostname, domain, DNS servers, localization, and webConfigurator settings.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "pfsense_system_general" "this" {}

output "system_general" {
  value = data.pfsense_system_general.this
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Read-Only

- `dashboard_available_widgets_panel` (Boolean) Show the available widgets panel on the dashboard.
- `dashboard_columns` (Number) Number of dashboard columns (1-6). Defaults to '2'.
- `disable_alias_popup_detail` (Boolean) Disable alias popup detail on mouse hover.
- `dns_localhost` (String) DNS resolution behavior. Options: ``, `local`, `remote`, `none`. Empty string means use default behavior.
- `dns_override` (Boolean) Allow DNS server list to be overridden by DHCP/PPP on WAN. Defaults to 'true'.
- `dns_servers` (Attributes List) DNS server configuration (up to 4 entries). (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--dns_servers))
- `domain` (String) System domain. Defaults to 'home.arpa'.
- `hostname` (String) System hostname. Defaults to 'pfSense'.
- `hostname_in_menu` (String) Display hostname in the menu bar. Options: `none`, `hostname`, `fqdn`. Defaults to `none`.
- `interfaces_sort` (Boolean) Sort interfaces alphabetically in the navigation.
- `language` (String) WebGUI language. Defaults to 'en_US'.
- `login_color` (String) Login page color (hex without #). Defaults to '1e3f75'.
- `login_show_host` (Boolean) Show hostname on login page.
- `require_state_filter` (Boolean) Require a filter to be entered before showing results in firewall states.
- `row_order_dragging` (Boolean) Disable dragging of table rows to reorder.
- `status_monitoring_settings_panel` (Boolean) Show the monitoring settings panel by default.
- `system_logs_filter_panel` (Boolean) Show the log filter panel by default in System Logs.
- `system_logs_manage_log_panel` (Boolean) Show the manage log panel by default in System Logs.
- `timeservers` (String) Space-separated list of NTP servers. Defaults to '2.pfsense.pool.ntp.org'.
- `timezone` (String) System timezone. Defaults to 'Etc/UTC'.
- `webgui_fixed_menu` (Boolean) Fix the navigation bar at the top of the page.
- `webgui_left_column_hyper` (Boolean) Enable left column navigation hyperlinks.
- `webgui_theme` (String) WebGUI theme CSS file. Defaults to 'pfSense.css'.

<a id="nestedatt--dns_servers"></a>
### Nested Schema for `dns_servers`

Read-Only:

- `address` (String) IP address of the DNS server.
- `gateway` (String) Gateway to use for reaching this DNS server. Leave empty for default routing.
- `hostname` (String) Hostname for DNS over TLS (DoT) requests.
